global.description: The ad features a gradient background with a prominent logo, headline, and call to action.
global.main_message: Engage with our brand and take action now!

elements.label: gradient background
elements.description: A smooth gradient background transitioning from dark blue at the top to light blue at the bottom.

elements.label: main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text centered at the bottom, conveying a key message with a modern font.

elements.label: supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline, providing additional information in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: brand logo
elements.description: A recognizable brand logo positioned at the top center, featuring vibrant colors and distinct design elements.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with contrasting colors, inviting users to take action with clear text.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern and vibrant, gradient background, bold text, brand logo
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the headline is at the bottom center, and the CTA is at the very bottom.
embedding_texts.elements_text: headline: Bold, white text centered at the bottom, conveying a key message with a modern font. | body_text: Smaller white text below the headline, providing additional information in a clean, readable font. | logo: A recognizable brand logo positioned at the top center, featuring vibrant colors and distinct design elements. | cta: A prominent button at the bottom with contrasting colors, inviting users to take action with clear text.
